overview.zh: 加拿大位于北美洲北部，是世界上国土面积第二大的国家，濒临大西洋、太平洋和北冰洋。自然资源丰富、社会多元，英语和法语同为官方语言，经济高度发达，以资源、制造与服务业为支柱。
overview.en: Canada occupies the northern part of North America and is the world's second-largest country by area, bordering the Atlantic, Pacific and Arctic oceans. Rich in natural resources and highly multicultural, it has English and French as official languages and a highly developed economy built on resources, manufacturing and services.

capitalHistory.zh: 首都渥太华于1857年由维多利亚女王选定为省府所在地，1867年加拿大联邦成立后成为国家首都。
capitalHistory.en: The capital Ottawa was chosen as the seat of government by Queen Victoria in 1857 and became the national capital when the Canadian Confederation was formed in 1867.

climate.zh: 以温带大陆性气候为主，冬季寒冷漫长；北部为寒带气候，西海岸受海洋影响相对温和。
climate.en: Largely a temperate continental climate with long, cold winters; the north is subarctic to arctic, while the west coast is milder due to maritime influence.

note.zh: 由卡利克萨·拉瓦莱作曲，1880年首次演唱，1980年正式定为国歌。
note.en: Music by Calixa Lavallée; first performed in 1880 and officially adopted as the national anthem in 1980.

name.en: Sugar maple (the maple leaf is a national emblem)

note.zh: 男足曾于1986年和2022年打进世界杯正赛，并将联合主办2026年世界杯。
note.en: The men's team qualified for the World Cup in 1986 and 2022 and will co-host the 2026 tournament.

colorNotes.zh: 红色与白色为国旗色，象征国家认同，广泛用于官方与节庆场合。
colorNotes.en: Red and white, the flag colors, symbolize national identity and are widely used in official and festive contexts.

colorNotes.zh: 色彩偏好总体与北美主流一致，无强烈普遍禁忌。
colorNotes.en: Color preferences broadly align with North American norms, with no strong universal taboos.

culturalTaboos.zh: 英语和法语同为官方语言，产品与界面通常需提供英法双语。
culturalTaboos.en: English and French are both official languages; products and interfaces usually require bilingual English-French content.

culturalTaboos.zh: 拼写沿用英式偏好（如 colour、centre），与美式英语有别。
culturalTaboos.en: Spelling follows British-influenced conventions (e.g., colour, centre), differing from American English.

formatting.zh: 日期书写较为混用，官方推荐 年-月-日；并用公制单位。
formatting.en: Date formats vary; the official recommendation is YYYY-MM-DD, and metric units are used.

formatting.zh: 货币为加拿大元，符号 $，需与美元等区分。
formatting.en: The currency is the Canadian dollar, symbol $, to be distinguished from other dollars.

funFacts.zh: 加拿大拥有全球最长的海岸线，长度约20万公里。
funFacts.en: Canada has the world's longest coastline, stretching roughly 200,000 kilometers.

funFacts.zh: 全国淡水湖泊数量居世界前列，境内湖泊数以百万计。
funFacts.en: Canada holds a large share of the world's lakes, with millions of freshwater lakes across the country.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
